patterns_recognized: TOR@BOS structural repeat: model again picks BOS (Yesavage vs Sonny Gray) at D-grade (-3) with SP xERA AGAINST pick and PQI opposing — identical structural pattern to the 06-17 shutout loss 3-0 to Scherzer; no reason to deviate from D-grade SKIP.

Triple-flag auto-SKIP (STL@KC): acute_roster=True + F1_xera_gap=0.88* (thin-sample asterisk) + edge_pp=-0.99 all fire simultaneously — per 06-17 BAL@SEA lesson this exact combination is a confirmed LOSS predictor; confidence_downgrade=True further blocks CAP-1 rescue per 06-05 rule.

F1* and SP xERA grade factors share the same thin-sample source, overstating the effective signal count. DOWNGRADE GOLD to SKIP.
